nasb.text: and did not inquire of the Lord. Therefore He killed him and turned the kingdom to David the son of Jesse.

esv.text: He did not seek guidance from the Lord. Therefore the Lord put him to death and turned the kingdom over to David the son of Jesse.

cnv.text: 沒有求問耶和華，所以耶和華把他殺死了，把國位轉給耶西的兒子大衛。

ccb.text: 而不求问耶和华。因此，耶和华使他被杀，把王位交给了耶西的儿子大卫。
